case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS.ELISEO RIVERA MARTINEZ ET AL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, ELISEO RIVERA INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA RIVERA TRUCKING $49,842.46 PRINCIPAL, $2,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,049.00 INTEREST, $452.52 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $54,843.98, SEE SCANNED DOC
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-23-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
